requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——230V/50Hz G型插头（TZS IEC 62368-1）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——230V/50Hz G型插頭（TZS IEC 62368-1）

summary.en: Tanzania operates on 230V/50Hz with Type-G plugs (British 3-pin square, BS 1363 equivalent). Wireless and IoT devices with power adapters or direct mains connections must comply with the Tanzania Standard TZS IEC 62368-1 for audio/video, information and communications technology equipment safety (adopting IEC 62368-1). Electrical safety compliance is assessed by TBS or a TBS-recognised internationally accredited laboratory. Products must be adapted for the 230V/50Hz Type-G environment; Chinese 220V Type-A or Type-I plug configurations are not suitable for Tanzania without modification. CCC electrical safety certification from China is not recognised by TBS.
summary.zh: 坦桑尼亚采用230V/50Hz电制，插头类型为G型（英式三孔方脚，相当于BS 1363）。带电源适配器或直接接市电的无线及物联网设备须符合坦桑尼亚标准TZS IEC 62368-1（采用IEC 62368-1，音视频、信息和通信技术设备安全）。电气安全合规性由TBS或TBS认可的国际认可实验室评定。产品须适配230V/50Hz G型插头环境；中国220V A型或I型插头配置不经改装不适用于坦桑尼亚。中国CCC电气安全认证不被TBS承认。
summary.zht: 坦尚尼亞採用230V/50Hz電制，插頭類型為G型（英式三孔方腳，相當於BS 1363）。帶電源適配器或直接接市電的無線及物聯網裝置須符合坦尚尼亞標準TZS IEC 62368-1（採用IEC 62368-1，音視頻、資訊和通訊技術設備安全）。電氣安全合規性由TBS或TBS認可的國際認可實驗室評定。產品須適配230V/50Hz G型插頭環境；中國220V A型或I型插頭配置不經改裝不適用於坦尚尼亞。中國CCC電氣安全認證不被TBS承認。

standards_or_laws: TZS IEC 62368-1 — Audio/Video, Information and Communications Technology Equipment Safety (Tanzania Standard, adopting IEC 62368-1)
BS 1363 — Type-G Plug and Socket (applicable reference for plug compatibility)
Tanzania Bureau of Standards (TBS) Certification Scheme

summary.en: China uses 220V/50Hz with Type-A and Type-I plugs. Electrical safety is covered by GB 4943.1 (information technology equipment safety, adopting IEC 62368-1) under the CCC mandatory certification scheme. CCC test reports from CNCA-accredited laboratories are China-domestic only and are not recognised by TBS or accepted as a substitute for Tanzania TZS IEC 62368-1 compliance.
summary.zh: 中国采用220V/50Hz电制，使用A型和I型插头。电气安全由强制性认证（CCC）体系下的GB 4943.1（信息技术设备安全，采用IEC 62368-1）覆盖。来自CNCA认可实验室的CCC测试报告仅限于中国境内使用，不被TBS承认，也不能替代坦桑尼亚TZS IEC 62368-1合规。
summary.zht: 中國採用220V/50Hz電制，使用A型和I型插頭。電氣安全由強制性認證（CCC）體系下的GB 4943.1（資訊技術設備安全，採用IEC 62368-1）覆蓋。來自CNCA認可實驗室的CCC測試報告僅限於中國境內使用，不被TBS承認，也不能替代坦尚尼亞TZS IEC 62368-1合規。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1 — Information Technology Equipment Safety (China, adopting IEC 62368-1)
China Compulsory Certification (CCC) — Electrical and Electronic Equipment

gap.en: Tanzania's 230V/50Hz Type-G environment requires hardware adaptation (plug type and voltage range) and separate TZS IEC 62368-1 safety compliance assessed by TBS or a TBS-recognised laboratory. CCC certification is not recognised. Chinese 220V Type-A/I plug configurations must be modified for the Tanzanian market.
gap.zh: 坦桑尼亚230V/50Hz G型插头环境要求硬件适配（插头类型和电压范围）以及由TBS或TBS认可实验室评定的独立TZS IEC 62368-1安全合规。CCC认证不被承认。中国220V A型/I型插头配置须为坦桑尼亚市场进行改装。
gap.zht: 坦尚尼亞230V/50Hz G型插頭環境要求硬件適配（插頭類型和電壓範圍）以及由TBS或TBS認可實驗室評定的獨立TZS IEC 62368-1安全合規。CCC認證不被承認。中國220V A型/I型插頭配置須為坦尚尼亞市場進行改裝。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Electrical safety compliance under TZS IEC 62368-1 is required for mains-powered wireless and IoT devices exported from China to Tanzania. Products must be adapted for Tanzania's 230V/50Hz Type-G (British square-pin) plug environment. Chinese CCC certification under GB 4943.1 is not accepted as an equivalent by TBS. Separate testing and TBS certification are required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 从中国出口到坦桑尼亚的市电供电无线及物联网设备须符合TZS IEC 62368-1电气安全要求。产品须适配坦桑尼亚230V/50Hz G型（英式方脚）插头环境。中国GB 4943.1下的CCC认证不被TBS视为等同认可。须进行单独测试并取得TBS认证。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 從中國出口到坦尚尼亞的市電供電無線及物聯網裝置須符合TZS IEC 62368-1電氣安全要求。產品須適配坦尚尼亞230V/50Hz G型（英式方腳）插頭環境。中國GB 4943.1下的CCC認證不被TBS視為等同認可。須進行單獨測試並取得TBS認證。
